name: mon-projet-resto
description: Multi-tenant restaurant aggregator — Angular client + Node/Express API + Headless Shopify checkout.

scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server install
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n CLIENT,SERVER -c blue,magenta "npm run dev:client" "npm run dev:server"
scripts.build: npm --prefix client run build && npm --prefix server run build
